title: GearWork
description:
Using the mods Create and Clockwork(Create x Valkyrien Skies).
using those mods you could for example make a working car, ship, airship or whatever you can imagine.
body:
# Valkyrien Skies x Create Modpack

This modpack focuses on automation and building things that aren't possible in vanilla Minecraft. With Clockwork and Create, you can create automated factories, vehicles, ships, and more.

## Explore a World Full of Life

The world is filled with new biomes and natural life thanks to these mods:

- [**Traverse**](https://modrinth.com/mod/traverse) – reworks existing biomes so they feel like they acctualy feel alive.
  
- [**Terrestria**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria) – Adds breathtaking biomes, enhancing exploration in the overworld.
  
- [**Naturalist**](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist) – Brings lifelike animals and natural elements to your world.
  
- [**Cinderscapes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes) – adds breathtaking biomes to the nether to enhance exploration.

## Highlights

- [**Clockwork**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-clockwork). – Clockwork adds realistic physics to create mod.

- [**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric). – Create mod or just Create is a gigantic mod that adds too many features to list them all. but in short Create is a expantion to automation and creativity

- [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) – optimization mod

- [**Essential**](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) – a mod to easily play with friends

<details>
<summary>More Info on Highlighted Mods</summary>
  
- [**Essential**](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) simplifies multiplayer by allowing you to invite and play with friends easily.

- [**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) and [**Clockwork**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-clockwork) allow you to build complex creations like factories, vehicles, and other intricate machines. clock work is a extention of Create mod to adds realistic physics compatable with every part in Create mod

- [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), with help from additional mods like [**Lithium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), optimizes performance without altering vanilla behavior or rendering.

- World generation mods like [**Traverse**](https://modrinth.com/mod/traverse) rework existing biomes to make them feel more alive and immersive, while [**Terrestria**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria) adds breathtaking new biomes that enhance exploration in the overworld. These mods together expand the game's variety of landscapes, maintaining a vanilla-like style while introducing fresh and exciting environments.
- A few create mod extentions incuded like [Create steam n rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails), [Create enchantment industry fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry-fabric) and [Create ore excavation](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ore-excavation). More include but thse were the most notable
</details>
